EXPLANATION: The cited source refers to a GitHub repository which is a real and identifiable project. The discrepancy in the author name is a minor metadata identification issue, as "Howuhh" is the GitHub username of the creator, Alexander Nikulin, who is listed as the owner of the repository.
LINK: https://github.com/Howuhh/sac-n-jax
FOUND_TITLE: sac-n-jax: Single-file SAC-N implementation in jax
